# SAGEDO
> India's First AI + Human Hybrid Execution Team

SAGEDO builds and grows Indian businesses using AI automation combined with human execution. We deliver websites, SEO, CRM systems, WhatsApp bots, legal registrations, mobile apps, branding, and more — in 24-48 hours.

- Website: https://sagedo.in
- Services: https://sagedo.in/services
- Free Audit: https://sagedo.in/free-audit
- Blog: https://sagedo.in/blog

- Contact: https://sagedo.in/contact
- Book a Call: https://sagedo.in/book-call
- Careers: https://sagedo.in/careers

- Founder: Mukul Dhiman (Ex-Aerospace Engineer, Tata Lockheed Martin)

## Packages (One-Time)
- Starter Launch: ₹15,000 — Logo, Website, SEO, Google Business, Email (7 days)
- Full Launch: ₹35,000 — Complete digital business setup (10-12 days)
- VIP Launch: ₹95,000 — Enterprise infrastructure + app + dedicated engineer (15 days)
